context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements FBA overcharge detection using dimensional weight (LxWxH/139), size tier classification, $10 threshold, and generates prioritized optimization recommendations using the correct category/priority/threshold logic.

checklist.name: Dimensional weight formula
checklist.description: Dimensional weight is computed as (length * width * height) / 139

checklist.name: Billable weight as max
checklist.description: Billable weight is taken as the maximum of actual weight (lbs) and dimensional weight — not just actual weight

checklist.name: Small standard tier
checklist.description: small_standard size tier criteria: longest <= 15, median <= 12, shortest <= 0.75, weight_lbs <= 0.75

checklist.name: Large standard tier
checklist.description: large_standard size tier criteria: longest <= 18, median <= 14, shortest <= 8, weight_lbs <= 20

checklist.name: Overcharge threshold $10
checklist.description: Overcharges are only flagged when the variance (charged - expected) exceeds $10.00 per settlement period

checklist.name: Submit reimbursement action
checklist.description: Flagged overcharge records include an action field or recommendation indicating reimbursement claim submission

checklist.name: Long-term storage threshold
checklist.description: SKUs with long-term storage fees greater than $100 are flagged for inventory liquidation (high priority)

checklist.name: FBM switch threshold
checklist.description: SKUs where FBA fee rate exceeds 20% of revenue are flagged for FBM switch evaluation

checklist.name: Pricing review threshold
checklist.description: SKUs with net margin below 5% are flagged for pricing review (high priority)

checklist.name: Priority ordering
checklist.description: Optimization recommendations are sorted with 'high' priority items listed before 'medium' items

checklist.name: FBM priority logic
checklist.description: FBM switch recommendation is 'medium' priority when net_margin > 0, and 'high' priority when net_margin <= 0

checklist.name: Overcharges output file
checklist.description: Results are written to a file (CSV or JSON) containing the flagged overcharges with sku, expected vs charged amounts, and variance

checklist.name: Recommendations output file
checklist.description: Optimization recommendations are written to a file (CSV or JSON) listing each recommendation with sku, category, priority, and recommendation text
